title: Architecture Decision Record (metadata)
description: Validates the structured metadata fields of an Architecture Decision Record. ADRs are Markdown documents; this schema validates a YAML companion file or the extracted front-matter. The full ADR body (Context, Decision, Consequences) is free-form Markdown and is not validated by this schema.

id.description: Sequential ADR identifier. Format: ADR-{NNNN}. Never reused.

title.description: Decision title in imperative form (e.g., 'Use OPA as the policy engine').

status.description: proposed: under discussion. accepted: ratified and in effect. deprecated: no longer recommended but not replaced. superseded: replaced by another ADR.

date.description: Date the decision was accepted (ISO 8601). For proposed ADRs, the date the draft was created.

deciders.description: Individuals or roles who made or ratified this decision.

supersedes.description: ID of the ADR this decision replaces.

superseded_by.description: Required when status is superseded. ID of the replacing ADR.
